title: ARCHIVED – Resettlement Assistance Program and Case Management Services for Government-Assisted Refugees and other Vulnerable Newcomers - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED – Resettlement Assistance Program and Case Management Services for Government-Assisted Refugees and other Vulnerable Newcomers

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This process closed on August 20, 2021, at 5 p.m. PST.
Sign up for updates and information about new funding processes.
This call for proposals will support the implementation of the Immigration Levels Plan 2021–2023 by building the capacity of communities to resettle Government-Assisted Refugees (GARs) by
- establishing new Resettlement Assistance Program (RAP) service provider organizations under the Resettlement funding stream
- supporting the delivery of Settlement Program services using a Case Management approach for GARs and other vulnerable newcomer clients in all communities where GARS are destined under the Settlement funding stream
We have identified specific communities where services are needed. Only proposals addressing services in these communities will be considered for funding.
You have until August 20, 2021, at 5 p.m. PST to submit your proposal using the Grants and Contributions System partner portal . We won’t accept late submissions.

## Join a webinar to learn more about this funding process
We’re also hosting webinars in both official languages to help you understand the process and answer your questions. We’ll host a question and answer period at the end of each session.
For each session, you can
- Join the meeting (audio and video) using the Join meeting link Learn about joining a WebEx meeting from your browser
- Learn about joining a WebEx meeting from your browser
- ask questions using the Slido link and event code for that session
- call the teleconference phone number to listen to the audio only
For questions about accessibility and accommodations, email us at CFP-ADP@cic.gc.ca .
- English session—July 8, 2021, from 2 p.m. to 4 p.m. ET WebEx: Join meeting Slido event code : 695232 Teleconference number: 1-855-288-0982 / Access code: 173 701 3849
- French session—July 8, 2021, from 11 a.m. to 1 p.m. ET WebEx: Join meeting Slido event code : 174707 Teleconference number: 1-855-288-0982 / Access code: 173 782 7852
- Read RAP and Case Management CFP 2021 Funding Guidelines
- Review our other resources
The funding guidelines contain information important to your application. Read them carefully.
For help or to ask questions, email us at CFP-ADP@cic.gc.ca .
